title: Billie Jean
meaning_summary: Billie Jean remains one of pop's strongest long-tail recordings because its groove, hook, and cultural familiarity never really left circulation.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models global pop streaming, Thriller-era catalog demand, licensing reuse, and estate-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master economics with estate-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing and writer-side economics remain material for the estate
ownership.catalog_sale_status: Estate catalog economics can materially affect retained value
ownership.notes: Estate-side modeled range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
